title: Frequency-time-resolved Imaging Spectroscopy of Fine Structures in a Solar Radio Noise Storm
summary: LOFAR frequency-time-resolved imaging spectroscopy of a 30-40 MHz noise storm, fitting cleaned radio maps with 2D elliptical Gaussians to obtain centroids, FWHM sizes, areas, and uncertainties for continuum and embedded fine structures.
summary_cn: 已核验为 The Astrophysical Journal 正式论文；LOFAR 30-40 MHz 噪声暴精细结构研究明确使用 CLEAN 后图像的 2D elliptical Gaussian 拟合，输出 centroid、FWHM major/minor、面积和不确定度，是当前 Gaussian source-position / source-size 方法库的新增核心参考。
key_methods: CLEAN 图像、Tau A PSF、2D 椭圆 Gaussian、FWHM major/minor、centroid uncertainty、fine-structure drift-rate 拟合
why_relevant_to_current_project: 直接补强 DART / DRAT 图像中 Gaussian center、FWHM、beam/PSF、centroid uncertainty 和多源 centroid jump 的质量控制方案。
target_event_type: noise storm continuum, type I bursts, S-bursts, and spikes
gaussian_model: Clean maps are fitted with a 2D elliptical Gaussian; fitted parameters include amplitude, x0/y0, sigma_x/y and rotation angle. Frequency-time drift profiles use Gaussian + background + linear continuum.
centroid_definition: Source centroid locations are the x0/y0 positions from the 2D elliptical Gaussian fits to clean LOFAR maps and are tracked over time/frequency.
source_size_definition: FWHM major/minor axes and FWHM area are derived from Gaussian widths; the paper distinguishes cleaned/deconvolved continuum sizes from beam-convolved fine-structure sizes.
beam_handling: Dirty maps are CLEANed; an effective PSF is estimated from Tau A observations and translated to the solar position; frequency-dependent ionospheric refraction correction is applied.
background_handling: For drift-rate spectral profiles the model includes a background level and a linear continuum term; image fitting is tied to the CLEAN map and continuum/fine-structure comparison.
uncertainty_method: Centroid uncertainties follow Condon-style formulae; flux/noise is estimated from faint beams; drift-rate uncertainty uses Gaussian peak-frequency errors or manual slope bounds for low-contrast S bursts.
quality_control: CLEAN/PSF check, ionospheric correction, continuum-vs-fine-structure comparison, FWHM uncertainty, and multi-source centroid-jump flag.
applicability_to_DART_DRAT: 极高，适合直接借鉴到当前 DART / DRAT 的 Gaussian center、FWHM、residual、centroid uncertainty 和 multi-peak 诊断输出。
notes_for_current_code: 新增或优先检查 centroid_uncertainty、fwhm_major/minor、beam_status、continuum_reference_center、is_centroid_jump 和 is_multi_source_candidate。

title: Imaging spectroscopy reveals spike-like repeating radio burst pairs in the solar corona
summary: Nature Communications version of an imaging-spectroscopy analysis of spike-like repeating burst pairs in the solar corona, linking source displacement, drift behavior, and fine-structure recurrence.
summary_cn: 已从 arXiv 转为 Nature Communications 正式论文；把 spike-like burst pairs、成像频谱、源区位移和频率漂移串到一起，是当前主题与方法链条都高度贴近的新论文。
key_methods: 成像频谱、源区位移统计、burst pair 识别
why_relevant_to_current_project: 同时支撑 fine structure 物理解释、源区运动分析和后续 Gaussian center 讨论。
direction: spikes topping type III / type III burst
gaussian_model: 需要全文核对具体成像拟合模型；摘要已明确使用成像频谱与源位移分析。
centroid_definition: 基于成像频谱的源位置与位移度量。
source_size_definition: 摘要层面未给出显式 FWHM 公式，全文需补充。
beam_handling: 需全文核对 beam / scattering 处理细节。
uncertainty_method: 需全文核对位置与位移误差定义。
quality_control: 事件筛选 + 成像位移一致性检查
applicability_to_DART_DRAT: 可直接参考其成像频谱与源位移解释框架。
notes_for_current_code: 适合作为 Gaussian center trajectory 与 drift-rate 结果并行讨论的对标案例。

title: Multiwavelength Multipoint Observations of the October 28, 2021 Type III Radio Burst
summary: Open-access Solar Physics study of the 2021-10-28 X1.0 flare/type III event, combining EUV/HMI context, X-ray imaging, radio spectro-polarimetry, direction finding, and multipoint in-situ diagnostics.
summary_cn: 2026 Solar Physics 开放论文，把 EUV/HMI、X-ray、射电偏振/定向和多航天器原位观测串成从耀斑源区到日球层传播的 III 型暴分析模板。
key_methods: 多平台联合观测、活动区上下文、事件重建
why_relevant_to_current_project: 可直接借鉴当前项目中 AIA/HMI 背景、事件几何、射电源区识别和多平台证据链的写法。
direction: AIA / EUV / HMI / radio joint analysis
centroid_definition: 主要提供事件级源区识别、偏振和 direction-finding 约束，而非 Gaussian 图像中心公式。
quality_control: 多波段时序、极化方向、开放磁场和原位电子证据的一致性检查
applicability_to_DART_DRAT: 高，可直接参考 DART / DRAT 与 AIA 的联动展示。
notes_for_current_code: 适合补强 README 和方法综述中的多波段上下文章节。

title: Type-III solar radio bursts with spike-like toppings
summary: A statistical study of type III solar radio bursts with spike-like toppings, focusing on timing offsets, frequency offsets, fine-structure classes, and polarization behavior.
summary_cn: 已核验为 Astronomy & Astrophysics 正式论文；统计研究 spike-like toppings 与 III 型暴主体的时间差、频率差、形态分类和偏振特征，是当前项目最直接的主题论文。
key_methods: 宽带动态频谱统计、topping 定义与时间/频率偏移测量
why_relevant_to_current_project: 直接给出 spike topping 的观测边界和统计事实，可作为当前论文的核心对照文献。
direction: spikes topping type III / type III burst
target_event_type: type III bursts with spike-like toppings
quality_control: 事件级统计筛选与形态分类
applicability_to_DART_DRAT: 为 DART / DRAT 事件筛选和 topping 分类提供直接物理背景。
notes_for_current_code: 优先用于定义 topping 事件筛选标准，而不是成像拟合。

title: Magnetic Field Geometry and Anisotropic Scattering Effects on Solar Radio Burst Observations
summary: Radio-wave propagation simulations with non-radial magnetic fields show that anisotropic scattering can shape apparent source morphology, source motion, position splitting, and measured drift rates of fine structures.
summary_cn: 该文说明磁场几何和各向异性散射会改变 fine-structure 的表观源区形态、源区运动、源区分裂和频漂率，是解释 Gaussian center 与 contour center 偏差的重要物理背景。
key_methods: 磁场约束的各向异性散射模拟、表观源区运动、源区双峰/分裂、drift-rate 偏差解释
why_relevant_to_current_project: 为 Gaussian 椭圆方向、multi-peak flag、source trajectory 和 drift-rate 速度解释提供直接的物理边界。
direction: solar radio fine structures / source morphology
instrument: simulation motivated by LOFAR fine-structure observations
target_event_type: solar radio fine structures, spikes, type IIIb striae
gaussian_model: 不提供拟合公式；用于解释为什么单源 Gaussian 椭圆和中心可能只是传播后的表观结果。
centroid_definition: apparent source position may move along magnetic-field geometry rather than density-gradient direction.
source_size_definition: source morphology and apparent size are modified by anisotropic scattering and can split into multiple apparent components.
beam_handling: 强调 scattering / propagation 是 beam 之外的关键表观扩展与分裂来源。
uncertainty_method: 把磁场几何、散射各向异性和 source bifurcation 作为 centroid 系统误差来源。
quality_control: multi-peak flag、ellipse angle 与磁场方向对比、drift-rate 传播效应检查
applicability_to_DART_DRAT: 高，适合解释 DART / DRAT 图像中低频源区拉长、偏心、多峰和 trajectory 异常。
notes_for_current_code: 若 Gaussian ellipse 长轴方向和 contour 多峰结构随频率系统变化，应先输出传播/散射警告，不直接解释为真实源区结构。

title: Solar Radio Spikes and Type IIIb Striae Manifestations of Sub-second Electron Acceleration Triggered by a Coronal Mass Ejection
summary: LOFAR observations suggest that solar radio spikes and type IIIb striae can arise from the same sub-second electron acceleration process triggered by a CME context.
summary_cn: 已核验为 The Astrophysical Journal 正式论文；把 spikes 和 IIIb striae 放进同一亚秒电子加速框架，非常适合支撑 topping 不是随机噪声的论证。
key_methods: LOFAR 精细结构比较、共源解释
why_relevant_to_current_project: 适合在讨论部分支撑 spike topping 与 III 家族精细结构之间的联系。
target_event_type: solar radio spikes and type IIIb striae
beam_handling: 重点讨论传播与散射背景。
quality_control: 多事件形态一致性检查
applicability_to_DART_DRAT: 为 DART / DRAT 上 spike 与 striae 的物理归因提供背景。
notes_for_current_code: 主要用于物理解释，不直接映射到拟合参数。

title: Sizes and Shapes of Sources in Solar Metric Radio Bursts
summary: A multi-frequency LOFAR study of solar metric radio source sizes and shapes using 2D Gaussian profiles with elliptical half-maximum contours, empirical instrumental/ionospheric corrections, and deconvolved source-size estimates interpreted through anisotropic scattering.
summary_cn: 今日补入的关键 Gaussian 方法论文；该文用 2D Gaussian profiles 与 elliptical half-maximum contours 表征太阳 metric 射电源的尺寸和形状，并结合仪器/电离层经验修正与去卷积尺寸解释各向异性散射，非常适合当前 source morphology 与 FWHM 质量控制。
key_methods: LOFAR 多频源区尺寸/形状、2D Gaussian、elliptical half-maximum contours、仪器/电离层修正、deconvolved size
why_relevant_to_current_project: 直接补强 DART / DRAT Gaussian ellipse、FWHM major/minor、source morphology、beam/PSF 修正和低频散射解释，是方法库应长期保留的核心论文。
gaussian_model: Approximates derived intensity distributions using 2D Gaussian profiles with elliptical half-maximum contours.
centroid_definition: The source position is tied to the fitted 2D Gaussian morphology and its elliptical half-maximum contour; centroid interpretation must account for instrumental/ionospheric corrections.
source_size_definition: Source sizes and ellipticities are inferred from the 2D Gaussian approximation and reported as deconvolved sizes after empirical corrections.
beam_handling: Uses an empirical method based on known-source observations to evaluate instrumental and ionospheric effects before interpreting deconvolved source sizes.
background_handling: Not the main focus; image/source morphology correction and propagation effects dominate the method value.
uncertainty_method: Treats instrumental, ionospheric, and anisotropic scattering effects as key systematic terms in source-size and shape interpretation.
quality_control: frequency-dependent size/ellipticity trend, empirical instrumental/ionospheric correction, deconvolution status, anisotropic scattering consistency
applicability_to_DART_DRAT: 极高，可直接用于设计 FWHM_major/minor、ellipticity、deconvolution_status、propagation_warning 和 overlarge_fwhm flag。
notes_for_current_code: 建议在 DART / DRAT 输出中增加 ellipticity、fwhm_deconvolution_status、beam_or_psf_reference 和 morphology_frequency_trend 字段。

title: LOFAR observations of radio burst source sizes and scattering in the solar corona
summary: LOFAR visibility-domain fitting of a type IIIb radio burst source with an elliptical Gaussian to estimate source size and position while avoiding image-domain deconvolution artifacts; the paper interprets large apparent sizes as scattering signatures.
summary_cn: 已修正为 arXiv:2011.13735 对应的 A&A 正式论文；该文直接在 LOFAR visibilities 上用 elliptical Gaussian 拟合 IIIb 源区尺寸和位置，避免图像域 PSF 去卷积伪影，是 DART / DRAT 讨论 observed apparent size 与散射效应的核心参考。
key_methods: LOFAR visibility-domain elliptical Gaussian、FWHM major/minor、source position、散射解释
why_relevant_to_current_project: 直接支持当前项目把低频大 FWHM 写成 observed apparent size，并把散射/折射作为 Gaussian center 和 source size 的系统误差来源。
gaussian_model: Directly fits LOFAR visibilities with an elliptical Gaussian to estimate source size and position.
centroid_definition: The fitted elliptical Gaussian position in the visibility-domain model is used as the apparent source position.
source_size_definition: Reports FWHM major/minor axes of the fitted elliptical Gaussian as apparent source size.
beam_handling: Visibility fitting is used to avoid image-domain deconvolution artifacts; interpretation still emphasizes scattering/refraction.
background_handling: Not the central focus; source size interpretation is dominated by visibility fit quality and propagation effects.
uncertainty_method: Reports small statistical FWHM fit uncertainties but treats coronal scattering/refraction as the physical interpretation limit.
quality_control: visibility-domain fitting, FWHM major/minor, scattering/refraction interpretation, observed-vs-true size caution
applicability_to_DART_DRAT: 高，尤其适合当前项目在缺少可靠 beam 时把 DART / DRAT FWHM 标为 observed apparent size。
notes_for_current_code: 若未来能接触 visibility 或 beam 信息，可优先比较图像域 Gaussian 与 visibility-domain source-size 估计；当前阶段先保留 observed apparent size。

title: Sub-second Time Evolution of Type III Solar Radio Burst Sources at Fundamental and Harmonic Frequencies
summary: The paper explains sub-second variations in type III/IIIb source positions and source sizes at fundamental and harmonic emission using 3D Monte Carlo ray-tracing with anisotropic density turbulence.
summary_cn: 该文把 III/IIIb 源区 sub-second centroid、source size 和 fundamental/harmonic 差异与各向异性散射模拟联系起来，是解释低频源区中心漂移和 apparent size 的关键文献。
key_methods: sub-second 成像、centroid/source size 时序、fundamental/harmonic 源区差异、各向异性散射模拟
why_relevant_to_current_project: 支撑当前项目在低频弱源或 early frames 中谨慎解释 Gaussian center 漂移和 FWHM 变化。
target_event_type: type III / type IIIb burst with fundamental and harmonic components
gaussian_model: 不以 Gaussian 公式为主，重点是观测 centroid locations 与 source sizes 的时序解释。
centroid_definition: 使用窄频成像得到的 centroid locations 作为表观源位置，并与传播模拟输出比较。
source_size_definition: 比较 fundamental 与 harmonic apparent source sizes 及其 sub-second 演化。
beam_handling: 重点讨论各向异性散射造成的表观位置和尺寸变化；真实源区大小解释需保守。
background_handling: 需结合全文核对具体背景处理。
uncertainty_method: 将传播散射作为系统误差来源，不能只用拟合协方差衡量 centroid 可靠性。
quality_control: fundamental/harmonic 区分、sub-second 连续性、source size 与 time profile 一致性
applicability_to_DART_DRAT: 高，适合解释低频源区的 centroid drift、FWHM 增大和速度估计偏差。
notes_for_current_code: 建议对低频帧增加 propagation_warning，并在速度拟合前检查 source-size/time-profile 是否受散射主导。

title: Frequency-Distance Structure of Solar Radio Sources Observed by LOFAR
summary: LOFAR spectral imaging study of 30-50 MHz solar radio sources, comparing apparent source distances with density-model predictions and testing source-position methods including maxima, thresholded centers of mass, and 2D elliptical Gaussian fitting.
summary_cn: LOFAR 30-50 MHz 频率-距离结构论文，明确比较最大亮度点、阈值质心和 2D 椭圆 Gaussian 拟合三种源位置方法，并指出 Newkirk 等密度模型与表观位置可能明显不一致。
key_methods: 最大亮度点、0.5 阈值质心、2D 椭圆 Gaussian 拟合、Newkirk/密度模型距离比较
why_relevant_to_current_project: 直接支持 Gaussian center 与 contour/阈值中心对比，并提醒 Newkirk 高度不能直接等同表观射电源位置。
target_event_type: solar radio bursts including type III-like events
gaussian_model: 使用 2D elliptical Gaussian fitting，并与最大亮度点和半峰值阈值中心方法交叉比较。
centroid_definition: source position 可由 intensity maximum、0.5 peak 阈值 center-of-mass 或 2D elliptical Gaussian center 得到，三者接近时说明源形态较对称。
source_size_definition: 源形态近似椭圆；重点在位置-频率关系而非单独 FWHM 统计。
beam_handling: 记录 LOFAR beam 尺度，并把电离层折射、散射和密度模型偏差作为表观位置误差来源。
background_handling: 以阈值图像和校准后的 beam-formed map 做位置估计；背景项公式需全文进一步核对。
uncertainty_method: 使用 Tau A 多频观测估计 centroid 误差和电离层折射修正，适合当前项目借鉴外部校准思路。
quality_control: 三种中心方法一致性、频率趋势、Tau A 校准、电离层折射和散射一致性检查
applicability_to_DART_DRAT: 极高，尤其适合建立 Gaussian center 与 contour center / intensity-weighted center 的可靠性验证。
notes_for_current_code: 建议新增 center_method_comparison 表，并把 Newkirk height 比较改为 height-frequency / apparent-distance 对照，而不是单一空间外推。

title: On the Source Position and Duration of a Solar Type III Radio Burst Observed by LOFAR
summary: LOFAR imaging spectroscopy was used to study the source position, apparent duration, directivity, and propagation effects of a solar type III radio burst.
summary_cn: LOFAR 成像频谱直接讨论 III 型暴的表观源位置、持续时间和传播效应，是 radio centroid 与 source motion 的关键方法论文。
key_methods: 成像频谱源定位、持续时间度量、传播效应分析
why_relevant_to_current_project: 可直接借鉴 centroid/trajectory 分析思路，并提醒传播效应会扭曲源区解释。
gaussian_model: 文摘与相关介绍指向椭圆源形拟合；正式引用前建议在全文核对参数化形式。
centroid_definition: 以成像频谱得到的源位置 / centroid 追踪 burst 在不同频率与时刻的表观位置。
source_size_definition: 讨论源持续时间与表观尺寸，适合作为 FWHM / size 的方法背景。
beam_handling: 强调传播与散射影响表观位置和尺寸，beam 解释需谨慎。
background_handling: 需全文核对是否显式保留背景项。
uncertainty_method: 可结合其位置变化和传播讨论，转化为 centroid 可靠性约束。
quality_control: 多频位置一致性 + 传播效应检查
applicability_to_DART_DRAT: 高，适合借鉴源中心轨迹、持续时间和传播偏差解释。
notes_for_current_code: 应把 Gaussian center 与 drift-rate 解释分开，不可把表观中心直接等同电子束真实位置。

title: Low Altitude Solar Magnetic Reconnection, Type III Solar Radio Bursts, and X-ray Emissions
summary: A joint radio, AIA, HMI, and X-ray study linking low-altitude reconnection to type III bursts and electron acceleration signatures.
summary_cn: AIA / HMI / X-ray / radio 联合分析的经典框架，可直接支撑当前项目的多波段物理图景。
key_methods: AIA/HMI/X-ray/radio 联合分析、源区物理图景
why_relevant_to_current_project: 适合作为 EUV 与射电联合分析的结构模板。
direction: AIA / EUV / HMI / radio joint analysis
target_event_type: type III burst with reconnection context
centroid_definition: 重点在联合事件几何与时序，不以 Gaussian 拟合为主。
quality_control: 多波段时序与空间对应一致性
applicability_to_DART_DRAT: 适合为 DART / DRAT 结果寻找 AIA/HMI 物理上下文。
notes_for_current_code: 应把 AIA/HMI 上下文与射电 centroid 输出放到统一图版中。

title: The apparent positions of solar radio sources observed by the Low Frequency Array
summary: The paper quantified the apparent positions and areas of solar radio sources observed by LOFAR, using elliptical Gaussian fitting and discussing scattering effects on source size and centroid.
summary_cn: LOFAR 低频太阳射电源位置与面积的经典方法文献，明确涉及 elliptical Gaussian、源区大小和散射/表观位置偏差。
key_methods: 椭圆 Gaussian 拟合、表观面积估计、散射解释
why_relevant_to_current_project: 可直接借鉴 centroid、FWHM/area 和 apparent size 的写法，是 DART / DRAT 成像拟合最关键的参考之一。
gaussian_model: At each observing frequency the source position and area are fitted with an elliptical Gaussian.
centroid_definition: 椭圆 Gaussian 的中心位置作为 radio source centroid / source position。
source_size_definition: 由椭圆 Gaussian 的 major / minor axis 或面积表征表观 source size。
beam_handling: 重点讨论 scattering 对 apparent position 和 apparent size 的影响；真实尺寸解释需谨慎。
background_handling: 需结合全文核对是否显式采用常数背景项。
uncertainty_method: 可结合频率依赖的表观位移和散射讨论 centroid uncertainty。
quality_control: 多频位置趋势、面积随频率变化和传播散射一致性
applicability_to_DART_DRAT: 极高，可直接迁移到当前的 centroid / size / apparent source size 叙述框架。
notes_for_current_code: 若缺少可靠 beam 信息，应使用 observed apparent size，而不是 intrinsic size。

title: A decade of solar Type III radio bursts observed by the Nancay Radioheliograph 1998-2008
summary: A statistical survey of nearly 10,000 NRH type III bursts, explicitly fitting radio sources with 2D elliptical Gaussians and deriving observed and deconvolved FWHM source-size distributions.
summary_cn: NRH 近万例 III 型暴统计论文，明确使用 2D elliptical Gaussian 拟合源区，给出 observed/deconvolved FWHM、主轴/次轴和 beam 去卷积思路，是 Gaussian source-size 方法库核心文献。
key_methods: NRH 2D elliptical Gaussian 源区拟合、FWHM 主/次轴、beam 去卷积、近万例统计分布
why_relevant_to_current_project: 直接支撑当前项目把 Gaussian 椭圆参数写成 observed apparent size，并在 beam 信息可靠时再讨论 deconvolved size。
gaussian_model: Radio sources were fitted with 2D elliptical Gaussians to obtain semi-major/minor widths and tilt angle.
centroid_definition: Gaussian source fit provides the apparent source position on NRH maps; statistical source positions are then analyzed over solar cycle.
source_size_definition: sigma major/minor are converted to FWHM with 2.355, and rms FWHM is used for size statistics.
beam_handling: Assumes observed source, interferometer beam and intrinsic source are elliptical Gaussians; derives deconvolved true source size when beam is known.
background_handling: Uses brightness-temperature thresholded NRH maps; detailed background term is not the central focus.
uncertainty_method: Beamwidth, temporal averaging, alias ambiguity and multiple sources are treated as important limitations.
quality_control: peak brightness threshold, alias ambiguity screening, frequency-dependent beamwidth, multiple-source caveat
applicability_to_DART_DRAT: 极高，适合定义 FWHM_major/minor、beam deconvolution 和 overlarge_fwhm flag 的论文写法。
notes_for_current_code: 若 DART / DRAT beam 信息不完整，应先输出 observed_fwhm_major/minor；不要声称 intrinsic source size。

title: An Automated Detection Method for Solar Radio Type III Bursts Using Phase Clustering and Hierarchical Thresholding
summary: An automated detection method for type III bursts based on phase clustering and hierarchical thresholding, useful for candidate-event triage before detailed analysis.
summary_cn: 适合当前项目的事件候选筛选阶段，可在进入 Gaussian fitting 前自动筛出 III 型暴样本。
key_methods: 自动检测、阈值与聚类筛选
why_relevant_to_current_project: 可作为 DART / DRAT 事件候选自动化筛选的前处理参考。
quality_control: 自动检测准确率
applicability_to_DART_DRAT: 高，适合作为前置事件检测方法。
notes_for_current_code: 不直接修改核心拟合；先补自动筛选和诊断输出。

title: Comprehensive study of solar type II radio bursts and the properties of the associated shock waves
summary: A revised 2026 arXiv study of ten metric type II bursts using NRH radio imaging, AIA/SUVI/STEREO context, 2D Gaussian centroiding, density-model deprojection, and herringbone drift-rate estimates.
summary_cn: 2026-06-29 v4 更新的 type II / herringbone 研究；虽然科学对象不是当前项目的 type III spike topping，但其“NRH 射电等值线叠加 AIA、2D Gaussian 求中心、密度模型去投影、动态频谱 drift 估速”的方法链条对当前 Gaussian center / Newkirk / drift-rate 诊断设计有 B 级借鉴价值。
topic_tags: AIA / EUV / HMI / radio joint analysis
key_methods: NRH 2D Gaussian centroid、AIA 叠加、密度模型去投影、herringbone drift-rate 速度估计
why_relevant_to_current_project: 方法链条与当前项目需要比较 Gaussian center、密度模型高度和 dynamic-spectrum drift-rate 的思路相近；但事件类型是 type II / herringbone，物理结论不能直接迁移到 type III spike topping。
radio_frequency_range: 150-300 MHz; NRH imaging at 150, 173, and 228 MHz
gaussian_model: Uses a 2D Gaussian function to determine NRH source centroid location and peak intensity; it is a centroiding example rather than a dedicated elliptical morphology paper.
centroid_definition: Radio source center is the 2D Gaussian centroid in NRH Stokes I images, then deprojected with an electron-density isosurface.
source_size_definition: 否；主要使用中心位置和峰值强度，不作为尺度论文。
beam_handling: 未核验到可直接迁移的 beam 去卷积流程；不应据此讨论 intrinsic source size。
background_handling: 未核验到可直接迁移的图像背景扣除模型。
uncertainty_method: 主要不确定性来自密度模型、去投影和 shock 几何匹配；未核验到可直接迁移的 centroid 协方差公式。
quality_control: 结合 NRH 可用性、AIA/SUVI/STEREO 多视角、动态频谱选点和密度模型一致性检查。
applicability_to_DART_DRAT: 中等，适合作为 Gaussian center + AIA overlay + density-height + drift-rate 诊断链条的参照；不应把 type II shock 物理解释直接套到 type III spike topping。
notes_for_current_code: 建议把 AIA 叠加图、Gaussian centroid、密度模型配置、动态频谱选点和速度估计证据一起保存，便于论文级复核。

title: e-CALLISTO FITS Analyzer: A Software Framework for CALLISTO Solar Radio Data
summary: A software framework for e-CALLISTO dynamic-spectrum FITS data that supports time/frequency merging, background subtraction, polygon burst masks, maximum-intensity backbone extraction, drift-rate fitting, and Newkirk-model height/speed estimates.
summary_cn: e-CALLISTO 动态频谱 FITS 分析工具论文，包含背景扣除、时间/频率拼接、多边形 burst mask、最大强度 backbone、频漂率拟合和 Newkirk 高度/速度估计，对当前 drift-rate 选点保存和可复现分析很有参考价值。
key_methods: 动态频谱 FITS 合并、背景扣除、多边形 mask、backbone 提取、drift-rate/Newkirk 转换
why_relevant_to_current_project: 补强当前项目保存 drift 选取频谱图、选点线条和 Newkirk 速度比较的工程规范。
direction: Newkirk density model / frequency drift / source motion
radio_frequency_range: station-dependent metric solar radio burst bands
target_event_type: solar radio bursts, demonstrated on type II and applicable to drift-analysis workflows
centroid_definition: 不涉及射电图像中心定位；重点是动态频谱频率-时间轨迹。
background_handling: 明确包含 mean background subtraction、threshold clipping 和交互式 burst mask。
uncertainty_method: drift-rate 拟合和用户控制的 outlier removal 提供可复现误差检查入口。
quality_control: FITS 轴语义、背景扣除、mask 记录、backbone/outlier 保存、density-model 参数记录
applicability_to_DART_DRAT: 中高，适合当前动态频谱 drift-rate 选点和 Newkirk height-speed 计算记录。
notes_for_current_code: 建议保存 selected_points.csv、selected_spectrogram.png、density_model_config.json 和 drift_fit_residuals。

title: First Detailed MeerKAT Imaging Spectroscopy of a Solar Flare
summary: Detailed MeerKAT imaging spectroscopy of a solar flare showing multiple coherent sources and the value of high-fidelity imaging for interpreting radio source geometry.
summary_cn: MeerKAT 的高保真成像频谱展示了多相干源的分离与几何解释，对理解 source morphology 和 centroid 偏差很有帮助。
key_methods: 高保真成像频谱、多源几何解释
why_relevant_to_current_project: 能帮助区分单峰拟合与真实多源结构之间的差别。
gaussian_model: 更偏多源成像解释；适合作为单源 Gaussian 局限性的补充文献。
centroid_definition: 强调多源几何，而非单一中心。
beam_handling: 高保真成像背景下仍需警惕表观几何偏差。
quality_control: 多源分离与几何一致性
applicability_to_DART_DRAT: 中高，可作为源形态解释的补充。
notes_for_current_code: 如果 Gaussian residual 图持续异常，应考虑多源结构而不是继续调大 FWHM。

title: Implementation of a Near-real-time Recording and Reporting System of Solar Radio Bursts
summary: Published Astrophysical Journal article describing an OVRO-LWA near-real-time spectrogram stream, a YOLO detector trained on physics-based synthetic type III bursts, and automatic reporting within approximately 10 seconds.
summary_cn: 已核验为 The Astrophysical Journal 正式论文；使用 OVRO-LWA 实时频谱流、物理模型合成 III 型暴与 YOLO 检测，实现约 10 秒内自动报告，可作为 DART / DRAT 低延迟候选筛选的 B 级工程参考。
key_methods: OVRO-LWA 实时频谱流、物理模型合成 III 型暴、YOLO 检测、约 10 秒自动报告
why_relevant_to_current_project: 可借鉴其低延迟数据流、候选检测与报告链路；这是工程方法证据，不替代 Gaussian 源区拟合论文。
quality_control: 物理模型合成训练样本、III 型暴检测与低延迟报告链路
applicability_to_DART_DRAT: 高，主要体现在自动化流程而不是成像拟合。
notes_for_current_code: 适合作为每日脚本、日志和调度方式的工程参考。

title: Kinetic Processes to Radio Burst: First Observational-driven Study in Coronal Loops
summary: An observationally constrained multiscale study of slowly positively drifting bursts that combines NLFFF magnetic extrapolation, guiding-center electron transport, a hydrostatic density model, and PIC simulations to reproduce fundamental plasma emission and the observed drift sequence.
summary_cn: 2026-07-08 提交的 arXiv 预印本，尚未按正式期刊论文登记；以 SPDB（类似反向 III 型暴）的射电频漂、AIA 1600/304 Å 与 HMI 约束日冕环，并串联 NLFFF、导引中心电子输运、静力密度模型和 PIC，复现实测约 4 秒持续时间与频漂序列。
key_methods: AIA/HMI/射电时序约束、NLFFF 日冕环、静力密度剖面、导引中心电子输运、PIC 基波等离子体辐射
why_relevant_to_current_project: 为 frequency drift、密度模型和 AIA/HMI 联合解释提供跨尺度方法迁移；对象是 SPDB 而非 spike-topping III 型暴，因此只列 B 级。
direction: AIA / EUV / HMI / radio joint analysis
instrument: Ondřejov RT5, BLEN7M CALLISTO, SDO/AIA, SDO/HMI
radio_frequency_range: 600-2000 MHz observations; 600-1100 MHz modeled SPDB range
target_event_type: slowly positively drifting bursts (reverse type III-like)
centroid_definition: 动态频谱不提供直接射电成像中心；候选发射环由射电与 AIA 1600/304 Å 时序相关、HMI 磁场和 NLFFF 外推共同约束。
beam_handling: 不适用；研究使用动态频谱和数值模型，不提供射电图像 Gaussian/beam 去卷积。
uncertainty_method: 作者明确把当前结果视为初步的三位置 PIC 采样，尚未生成连续合成动态频谱；候选磁环需满足源高度、几何、电子束速度和频漂约束。
quality_control: AIA 1600/304 Å 与 1190 MHz 时序相关、HMI/NLFFF 磁连接、源高度与频漂一致性、观测量与模拟量分栏
applicability_to_DART_DRAT: 中等，可用于 AIA/HMI 联合背景、频漂与密度模型解释，不直接提供 Gaussian centroid/source-size 算法。
notes_for_current_code: 保留 observed 与 simulated 标记；不可把三处 PIC 采样或模型环位置写成直接观测到的射电 centroid。

title: Radio Diagnostics of Particle Acceleration in Solar Flares with SKAO Observations
journal: Advancing Astrophysics with the SKA II (AASKAII)
summary: A 2026 AASKAII chapter on solar-flare radio diagnostics with SKAO, emphasizing high-cadence imaging spectroscopy, polarimetry, electron-beam tracking, and synergy with EUV and X-ray observations.
summary_cn: 2026-06-27 提交的 AASKAII 章节，重点讨论 SKAO 对太阳耀斑粒子加速的射电诊断能力，包括高时空分辨成像、偏振、电子束追踪以及 EUV/X-ray 联合约束。它不是 DART / DRAT 源区拟合公式来源，但适合作为未来观测能力和多波段诊断背景。
key_methods: SKAO 高时空分辨成像频谱、偏振诊断、EUV/X-ray 联合约束
why_relevant_to_current_project: 适合作为当前论文讨论中“未来高保真成像与多波段诊断如何约束电子束和磁拓扑”的背景，不应替代现有 DART / DRAT 图像定位方法论文。
direction: AIA / EUV / HMI / radio joint analysis
radio_frequency_range: meter and microwave solar-flare radio bands
target_event_type: solar flare radio bursts and particle acceleration
centroid_definition: 不提供具体源中心定义；强调未来高时空分辨成像对电子束轨迹和磁场环境的诊断价值。
beam_handling: 讨论 SKAO 高分辨率观测能力，不给出当前 DART / DRAT 可直接套用的 beam 去卷积流程。
background_handling: 区分热辐射和非热辐射诊断背景，但不提供图像背景扣除算法。
uncertainty_method: 作为未来观测需求综述，不作为当前位置误差公式来源。
quality_control: 用于论证高时空分辨率、偏振和多波段联合观测的重要性。
applicability_to_DART_DRAT: 中等，适合写入引言/展望；当前阶段不据此修改源区拟合算法。
notes_for_current_code: 不建议据此修改核心拟合；可用于 README 或综述中的未来观测能力段。

title: Signatures of Large-Scale Magnetic Field Disturbances and Switchbacks in Interplanetary Type III Radio Bursts
summary: Radio-wave simulations and type III dynamic-spectrum analysis showing that large-scale magnetic-field disturbances and switchbacks can leave measurable signatures in interplanetary type III drift behavior.
summary_cn: 该文把大尺度磁场扰动 / switchback 与 III 型暴频漂行为联系起来，提醒 drift-rate 速度和密度模型高度推断可能同时受磁场几何和背景密度扰动影响。
key_methods: III 型暴频漂模拟、磁场扰动 / switchback 诊断、electron-beam 传播解释
why_relevant_to_current_project: 补强当前项目中 Newkirk height-derived speed、dynamic-spectrum drift-rate speed 与表观 source motion speed 不可直接等同的物理边界。
direction: Newkirk density model / frequency drift / source motion
instrument: radio dynamic spectra and propagation simulation
centroid_definition: 不涉及射电图像源中心定位；重点是频谱 drift-rate 与传播路径扰动。
beam_handling: 不适用。
background_handling: 需结合动态频谱背景和模拟输入参数核对。
uncertainty_method: 把磁场几何、密度扰动和传播路径作为 drift-rate 速度估计的系统误差来源。
quality_control: 区分密度模型趋势、磁场几何扰动和局部 switchback 造成的 drift-rate 偏差。
applicability_to_DART_DRAT: 中高，适合写入 drift-rate / Newkirk 速度讨论的误差来源与解释边界。
notes_for_current_code: 建议在速度比较表中保留 speed_method 字段，分开标注 Gaussian apparent motion、Newkirk model speed 和 spectral drift-rate speed。

title: Solar Radio Burst Fine Structures
journal: Advancing Astrophysics with the SKA II (AASKAII)
summary: A 2026 AASKAII review and SKA-oriented perspective on solar radio burst fine structures, including spikes, drift pairs, type III striae, herringbones, sub-second imaging spectroscopy, full-Stokes imaging, electron acceleration, magnetic reconnection, and coronal turbulence.
summary_cn: 已核验为 AASKAII 2026 章节记录；该综述覆盖 spikes、drift pairs、III 型 striae、II 型 herringbone、高时频成像、SKA full-Stokes 成像和电子加速/磁重联/湍流问题；适合作为当前论文引言和未来观测能力讨论的新增背景文献。
key_methods: 精细结构分类、sub-second 成像频谱、full-Stokes 成像能力需求、SKA 前瞻
why_relevant_to_current_project: 为 spikes topping type III 的物理背景、观测限制和未来高时频成像需求提供近期综述入口，但不直接给出 DART / DRAT 源区拟合公式。
target_event_type: solar radio fine structures including spikes, drift pairs, type III striae, and type II herringbones
centroid_definition: 综述强调时间-空间-频率成像能力，不提供单一源中心定义。
beam_handling: 以未来高分辨率成像能力和传播效应问题为背景，未提供 DART / DRAT 可直接套用的 beam 去卷积公式。
uncertainty_method: 适合作为观测限制和模型不足的背景，不作为源中心误差公式来源。
quality_control: 用于综述层面提醒现有理论模型和观测分辨率限制。
applicability_to_DART_DRAT: 中等，适合写引言/讨论和观测能力限制，不直接替代源区拟合方法论文。
notes_for_current_code: 不建议据此修改核心拟合模型；可用于 README 和综述中的 fine-structure 背景段。

title: The SKA as a Probe of Heliospheric Turbulence and Radio-wave Propagation Effects
journal: Advancing Astrophysics with the SKA II (AASKAII)
summary: A 2026 AASKAII chapter on using SKA observations and simulations to quantify heliospheric turbulence and radio-wave propagation effects, including angular broadening and distortions of observed solar-radio imaging and spectroscopic properties.
summary_cn: 已按 arXiv 核验为 AASKAII 2026 章节，不是期刊论文；讨论散射、闪烁与角展宽如何改变太阳射电源的成像和频谱表观性质，并强调需以观测—模拟比较分离 intrinsic 与 observed source properties。
key_methods: 观测—模拟传播效应比较、散射/角展宽诊断、成像与频谱表观量—本征量分离、SKA/LOFAR/空间射电互补
why_relevant_to_current_project: 直接约束 Gaussian centroid 与 source size 的物理解释边界，但属于 AASKAII 综述章节，不提供可直接实现的单一拟合公式，因此列 B 级。
instrument: SKA, LOFAR, ground-based interferometers, space-based radio instruments
radio_frequency_range: solar-to-heliospheric radio context from about 10 MHz to a few kHz
target_event_type: solar radio bursts and heliospheric radio-wave propagation
gaussian_model: 章节不提供单一 Gaussian 拟合公式。
centroid_definition: 强调观测到的源位置可受传播效应偏移，不能在未评估散射时直接等同本征发射位置。
source_size_definition: 观测角尺寸包含 radio-wave angular broadening；应将 observed apparent size 与 intrinsic source size 分开。
beam_handling: 需同时区分仪器分辨率/beam 与传播角展宽；章节不给出可直接套用的去卷积公式。
uncertainty_method: 以多频、多平台观测和传播模拟比较估计散射与湍流导致的系统偏差。
quality_control: intrinsic/observed 标记、传播效应状态、细弱结构可分辨性、多频与多平台一致性
applicability_to_DART_DRAT: 中高，适合约束 centroid/source-size 讨论与质量标记，不直接替代图像拟合方法论文。
notes_for_current_code: 建议保留 apparent_size、beam_status、scattering_status 与 intrinsic_size_claim 字段，未核验传播效应时不得输出 intrinsic size。

title: Electron Beam Propagation and Radio-Wave Scattering in the Inner Heliosphere using Five Spacecraft
summary: Published A&A five-spacecraft BELLA multilateration study of type III sources, with NRH 150 MHz imaging, SDO/AIA 171 Å and PFSS context, and quantitative radio-wave scattering constraints.
summary_cn: 已核验为 Astronomy & Astrophysics 正式论文；以五航天器 BELLA 多点定位追踪 III 型暴表观源路径，并用 NRH 150 MHz、SDO/AIA 171 Å 与 PFSS 提供低日冕上下文，直接约束传播与散射导致的位置和频漂偏差。
key_methods: 五航天器 BELLA 多点定位、NRH 150 MHz + AIA 171 Å + PFSS 联合上下文、散射约束
why_relevant_to_current_project: 提醒不能把 Newkirk 高度、Gaussian center 和电子束真实速度简单等同。
direction: Newkirk density model / frequency drift / source motion
instrument: Parker Solar Probe, STEREO A, Wind, Solar Orbiter, Mars Express, NRH, SDO/AIA
radio_frequency_range: 0.5-3 MHz multilateration with 150 MHz NRH context
centroid_definition: 以 BELLA 多航天器到达时差得到表观射电源位置，并以 NRH 150 MHz 干涉成像位置作低日冕约束；不是单幅图像的 Gaussian centroid。
beam_handling: 突出 scattering 对表观位置和频漂的影响。
uncertainty_method: 按航天器几何划分定位置信区域，并把传播路径、散射与仪器配置作为系统误差来源。
quality_control: 航天器几何置信度、五平台一致性、NRH/AIA/PFSS 低日冕交叉核对
applicability_to_DART_DRAT: 中高，适合写入误差和物理解释边界。
notes_for_current_code: 应把速度比较分成 apparent motion、density-model motion 和 drift-rate motion 三类。

title: A Review of Recent Solar Type III Imaging Spectroscopy
journal: Frontiers in Astronomy and Space Sciences
summary: A review of type III imaging spectroscopy covering source regions, propagation, scattering, fine structures, and the observational limits of imaging techniques.
summary_cn: III 型暴成像频谱的综述入口，适合统筹源区、传播、散射和精细结构的整体框架。
key_methods: 成像频谱综述、传播与散射背景
why_relevant_to_current_project: 适合作为文献综述的总入口，再向 Gaussian fitting、AIA 联合分析和 drift-rate 细分展开。
direction: Newkirk density model / frequency drift / source motion
gaussian_model: 综述性质，不提供单一拟合公式。
centroid_definition: 总结 source region / centroid 的观测局限。
source_size_definition: 总结 apparent size 与 scattering 问题。
beam_handling: 总结 beam / scattering / propagation 的综合影响。
uncertainty_method: 适合作为 centroid uncertainty 的背景综述。
quality_control: 方法综述
applicability_to_DART_DRAT: 适合搭建整个论文的方法与背景框架。
notes_for_current_code: 用于 README、综述和方法综述提纲。

title: Type III Solar Radio Burst Source Region Splitting Due to a Quasi-Separatrix Layer
summary: Published Astrophysical Journal study of 80-240 MHz MWA type III source splitting, using thresholded radio morphology, distance-time tracking, and SDO/AIA EUV jet context to interpret a quasi-separatrix-layer magnetic topology.
summary_cn: 已核验为 The Astrophysical Journal 正式论文；利用 MWA 80-240 MHz 成像、阈值化源区形态、distance-time 追踪与 SDO/AIA EUV jet 上下文解释 QSL 导致的源区分裂，说明多峰结构下单个 Gaussian center 可能不具唯一物理意义。
key_methods: MWA 阈值化源区椭圆、distance-time 运动追踪、AIA 304 Å EUV jet / QSL 联合解释
why_relevant_to_current_project: 可作为多峰源与单源 Gaussian 失效情形的关键警示文献。
gaussian_model: 该文更强调形态分裂，不应默认单源 Gaussian 足够。
centroid_definition: 多源结构下单个 centroid 可能不再具有唯一物理意义。
source_size_definition: 以峰值 20% 以上的阈值化源区拟合总体椭圆并跟踪分裂分量间距；形态分裂比单一 FWHM 更关键。
beam_handling: 重点不在 beam 去卷积，而在磁拓扑导致的真实多源形态。
background_handling: 动态频谱使用 5 分钟 boxcar 背景扣除；图像运动分析以边界像素噪声估计归一化强度。
uncertainty_method: 通过不同 SNR 阈值界定源前沿位置，分裂速度误差约为 15%；多峰结构本身也是 centroid 系统不确定性。
quality_control: multi-peak flag、相邻事件混叠排除、SNR 阈值范围与多频源区分裂一致性检查
applicability_to_DART_DRAT: 中高，尤其适合低频多峰事件的质量控制。
notes_for_current_code: 检测到多峰或 source splitting 时，不应直接输出单一物理速度。
